notes: No .workflow/project-tech.json file was present, so discovery used .workflow/.clean/clean-2026-04-28/mainline-profile.json and the current git status as the session baseline.
The currently modified expression-history files were treated as active work and intentionally excluded from cleanup recommendations.

`.workflow/active/WFS-game-content-expression-window` was not marked stale even though its session file says completed on 2026-04-20, because `.process/verify_expression.py` under that tree is currently modified.
`.workflow/.scratchpad` and `.claude/rules/tech` do not exist in this repository, so no drifted documents were found there.
Several `Game content extraction/tmp*` directories were visible but unreadable due to permission denied, so they were flagged conservatively at medium risk instead of low risk.
